daily.today_energy: Your aura's giving grounded stability with a sprinkle of curiosity. Today's the kind of day where slowing down actually speeds up your manifestations. Trust the process, babe.
daily.love: There's a softness in your connections right now. Whether you're coupled or solo, your vibe is magnetic—people are drawn to your authenticity. Let your guard down a little.
daily.career: Your practical energy is peaked today. This is when your ideas stop being daydreams and start becoming blueprints. Someone's noticing your worth—stay visible.
daily.health: Your body's asking you to actually listen to it. That restless feeling? Channel it into something nourishing—a walk, stretching, or just resting guilt-free. You're allowed to just be.

weekly.overview: Your vibe is shifting toward authenticity this week, Taurus. Mercury's energy is pushing you to speak your truth without the usual filter. Trust the momentum—clarity feels good on you right now.
weekly.love: Someone's noticing the real you, and honestly? That's the whole point. Whether you're coupled or single, this is about magnetic honesty. Show up as you are, not as a polished version.
weekly.career: Your creative instincts are lowkey sharp this week. That idea you've been sitting on? Worth exploring. The energy supports bold moves that feel grounded, not reckless. Your quiet confidence is your superpower.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for slowness—nourishing meals, actual rest, maybe a walk that feels less like cardio and more like meditation. Tune in to what makes you feel genuinely restored, not just checked off.
